description: Analyzes the input prompt to extract function name and parameters, then formats them into the correct function call structure

inputs.name: text
inputs.description: The natural language text containing the function call request that needs to be parsed

inputs.name: available_functions
inputs.description: JSON string containing the available function definitions and their parameter schemas

output.description: Returns the function call structure with the function name as the top-level key and its parameters as a nested object. Example for math.hypot: {"math.hypot": {"x": 4, "y": 5}}

fields.function_name: dict - Contains the function parameters as key-value pairs

workflow_spec.name: Parse Function Call from Text
workflow_spec.description: Extracts function name and parameters from natural language text and returns the appropriate function call structure
